semantic: receives channelsLoadedMsg, channelDeletedMsg; emits deleteChannelMsg, addSourceMsg; uses ChannelItem, addStep constants
uses titleStyle, helpDescStyle, selectedStyle, unselectedStyle, messageCountStyle, sourceTypeBadgeStyle, channelNameStyle, confirmStyle
matches Up, Down, Delete, Add, Confirm, Cancel key bindings
calls sourceTypeBadge helper defined in dashboard.go
